metadata.name: GithubStarsIndex
metadata.description: 自动抓取 GitHub Stars，生成 AI 摘要，便于检索。

summary.zh: GitHubStarsIndex 是一款自动化知识管理工具，通过 GitHub Actions 定时抓取用户 Star 列表，利用 AI 大模型生成仓库摘要与技术标签。支持增量更新、标签归一化治理及多语言静态页面生成，可同步至 Obsidian 或 GitHub Pages，将杂乱的 Star 列表转化为可检索的个人知识库。
summary.en: GitHubStarsIndex is an automated knowledge management tool that uses GitHub Actions to fetch starred repositories and generate AI summaries and technical tags. It supports incremental updates, tag normalization, and multi-language static page generation, syncing to Obsidian or GitHub Pages to transform scattered stars into a searchable personal knowledge base.

metadata.name: sms_forwarding
metadata.description: 超低成本硬件短信转发器，支持移动联通电信，ML307R+ESP32C3

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 ESP32C3 和 ML307R 的低成本短信转发项目。它支持移动/联通/电信卡，能将收到的短信通过 Web 界面配置，自动推送到邮箱、钉钉、飞书、微信等 7 种渠道。具备长短信合并、远程重启及余额消耗功能，适合个人通知与物联网通信场景，硬件总成本约 28 元。
summary.en: This project implements a low-cost SMS forwarding system using ESP32C3 and ML307R modules. It supports major Chinese carriers and forwards received SMS to 7 channels like Email, DingTalk, Feishu, and WeChat via a web interface. Features include long SMS merging, remote restart, and balance consumption, ideal for personal notifications and IoT communication with a total hardware cost of around $4.

metadata.name: GithubStarsManager
metadata.description: An app for managing github starred repositories.

summary.zh: GithubStarsManager 是一款跨平台桌面应用，专为开发者管理 GitHub 星标仓库设计。它利用 AI 自动总结、分类和语义搜索，解决星标杂乱问题。支持发布追踪、一键下载、Fork 管理和 Gist 编辑。数据 100% 本地存储，保障隐私，是提升知识管理效率的利器。
summary.en: GithubStarsManager is a cross-platform desktop app designed for developers to manage GitHub starred repositories. It leverages AI for automatic summarization, categorization, and semantic search to solve the problem of messy stars. It supports release tracking, one-click downloads, fork management, and Gist editing. Data is stored 100% locally for privacy, making it a powerful tool for enhancing knowledge management efficiency.
